# ForgeFlow Metal Industries LLP
> ISO 9001:2015 certified manufacturer, supplier and exporter of industrial flanges, pipes and pipe fittings headquartered in Mumbai (Thane), Maharashtra, India. Established 1997. Exporting to 10+ countries.

## Company

ForgeFlow Metal Industries LLP is a B2B industrial manufacturer based in Thane, Maharashtra, India. The company specialises in precision-forged flanges, seamless and welded steel pipes, and pipe fittings for the oil & gas, petrochemical, chemical processing, power generation, marine and construction industries. All products are manufactured under ISO 9001:2015 quality management and comply with international standards including ASME, ASTM, API, DIN and JIS.

- Website: https://forgeflowmetal.com
- Email: forgeflowmetal@gmail.com
- Phone: +91 88502 86165 | +91 80978 64693 | +91 79000 84693
- Office: A/2, Flat No. 203, Jilani Park, Talao Paali Road, Kausa, Thane – 400612, Maharashtra, India
- Unit 1: 516, Pimpri Village, Old Mumbai Pune Road, Near Dahisar Mori, Thane
- Unit 2: Plot No. 222, Kolsa Bunder, Darukhana, Mumbai – 400010

## Products

### Flanges
ForgeFlow manufactures 14 types of industrial flanges per ASME B16.5, ASME B16.47, ASME B16.36 and ASME B16.48 in pressure classes 150 through 2500, sizes ½ inch NB to 60 inch NB.

- Weld Neck Flanges: https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/weldneckflange.html
- Hub Flanges: https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/HubFlanges.html
- Without Hub Flanges: https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/outhubflanges.html
- Plate Flanges: https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/plateflange.html
- Slip On Flanges: https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/sliponflange.html
- Blind Flanges: https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/blindflange.html
- Socket Weld Flanges: https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/socketweldflange.html
- Threaded Flanges: https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/threadedflange.html
- Reducing Flanges: https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/reducingflange.html
- Lap Joint Flanges: https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/lapjointflange.html
- Orifice Flanges: https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/orificeflange.html
- Industrial Flanges: https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/industrialflange.html
- Ring Joint Flanges (RTJ): https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/ringjointflange.html
- Spectacle Flanges (Paddle Blind): https://forgeflowmetal.com/Products/spectacleflange.html

### Pipes
Seamless and welded steel pipes per ASTM A106, ASTM A53, ASTM A333, API 5L and DIN standards. Sizes ½ inch to 48 inch NB, schedules SCH 10 to XXS.

- All Pipes: https://forgeflowmetal.com/pages/pipe.html
- Types: Aluminium Pipe, Carbon Steel Pipe, Galvanized Steel Pipe, Stainless Steel Pipe, EUE Oil Tubing, API 5L Line Pipe, ASTM A106 Seamless Pipe, High Precision Low Carbon Seamless Pipe

### Pipe Fittings
Butt weld fittings per ASME B16.9, socket weld and threaded fittings per ASME B16.11. Sizes ½ inch to 48 inch NB.

- All Pipe Fittings: https://forgeflowmetal.com/pages/pipefitting.html
- Types: Elbow (45°, 90°, 180°), Equal Tee, Reducing Tee, Concentric Reducer, Eccentric Reducer, Cap, Stub End, Cross, Coupling

## Materials

All products available in the following material grades:

| Grade | Standard |
|---|---|
| Carbon Steel | ASTM A105 (flanges), ASTM A234 WPB (fittings), ASTM A106 Gr.B (pipes) |
| Stainless Steel 304/304L | ASTM A182 F304/F304L |
| Stainless Steel 316/316L | ASTM A182 F316/F316L |
| Stainless Steel 321 | ASTM A182 F321 |
| Duplex 2205 | ASTM A182 F51, UNS S31803 |
| Super Duplex 2507 | ASTM A182 F53/F55, UNS S32750/S32760 |
| Alloy Steel P11/F11 | ASTM A182 F11 |
| Alloy Steel P22/F22 | ASTM A182 F22 |
| Alloy Steel P91/F91 | ASTM A182 F91 |
| Monel 400 | ASTM B564 N04400 |
| Inconel 625 | ASTM B564 N06625 |
| Hastelloy C276 | ASTM B564 N10276 |
| Titanium Gr.2 | ASTM B381 |
| Aluminium | ASTM B221 |

## Standards & Certifications

- Quality: ISO 9001:2015
- Flanges: ASME B16.5, ASME B16.47 Series A & B, ASME B16.36, ASME B16.48, DIN 2501, JIS B2220, EN 1092-1
- Pipes: ASTM A106, ASTM A53, ASTM A333, API 5L, ASTM A312, DIN 17175, IS 1239
- Fittings: ASME B16.9, ASME B16.11, MSS SP-43, ASTM A234, ASTM A403, ASTM A815

## Applications

- Oil & Gas (upstream, midstream, downstream)
- Petrochemical & Refinery
- Chemical Processing
- Power Generation
- Water Treatment & Infrastructure
- Marine & Offshore
- Pharmaceutical & Food Processing
- Construction & Structural

## Export Markets

UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Oman, Bahrain, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, South Africa, Kenya, United Kingdom, Germany, USA, Canada.

Export documentation provided: Mill Test Certificate (MTC), Certificate of Origin (COO), MSDS, Packing List, Third-Party Inspection (TPI/SGS/BV available on request).
